messages.content: Search for 快手 财经内容 合规 规则 2024 2025 禁止 金融 管理规范

I'll search for Kuaishou financial content compliance rules. Let me start by checking the workspace and searching online.
<minimax:tool_call>
<invoke name="shell">
<parameter name="description">Check workspace contents</parameter>
<parameter name="command">ls -la /home/administrator 2>/dev/null || echo "Directory not found"</parameter>
</invoke>
<invoke name="shell">
<parameter name="description">Search for Kuaishou financial compliance info</parameter>

</invoke>

</invoke>
